# R3G-03 promote fixtures (Plan scaffold)

Minimal aligned artifacts for `approval_contract` / promote CLI tests.
Execute may extend; fields must stay consistent across all four files.

| File                         | Role                                                |
| ---------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `approval_minimal.yaml`      | §6 approval template (baostock single-source pilot) |
| `audit_decision_allow.json`  | `PASS_ALLOW_LIMITED_PROD_WRITE`                     |
| `before_proof_minimal.json`  | §7 before fields                                    |
| `rollback_plan_minimal.json` | dry-run identify-only plan                          |

Aligned envelope: `baostock` / `cn_equity_daily_bar` / `sh.600000` / 2026-05-01..2026-05-30 / max_rows 100.
